column1: The box is as _____ as the suitcase. (heavy)
Which is _____ : the box or the suitcase? (heavy)

- This is _____ , isn't it?

- Right, the map belongs to _____ . (you, I)
She wants to buy it for _____ uncle. (she)
The ostrich is the _____ of all birds. (big)
Beavers use their strong front _____ to cut down _____ . (tooth, tree)
